_doc: User-excluded sources. Symmetric counterpart to user_curated_sources.json. Events matching any entry get a heavy negative rank penalty (effectively dropped). Auto-grown from engagement signals (events the user hides 3+ times from a single account/host), AND seeded with accounts the user has explicitly mentioned not wanting. Read by ranking.py:_user_excluded_penalty and interest_profile.py (excluded accounts get removed from signal_accounts so they don't receive the IG-follow boost even when followed).

houseofyesnyc.note: club / late-night DJ venue — not the meeting-people vibe user wants
